blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 47°F.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
